cast.name: 苏赞妮·德芭奎 Suzanne De Baecque
利蒂希亚·斯皮加雷利 Laetitia Spigarelli

introduction: Diane has stopped counting the years that fly by. Now, isolated, she kills time fishing, watching the days pass and repeat themselves despite the hustle and bustle of the 2024 Olympics project. On the eve of a planned departure, Diane lingers on the quays of Austerlitz, looking for catfish, before heading to the bridge of the ship. The Bridge of the Ship concludes a summer trilogy in the capital filmed over three summers.
